name: RealEscape
short_description: Enter The Lethe, a forsaken asylum where reality and nightmare blur. In RealEscape, solve puzzles, uncover dark secrets, and face terrifying challenges alone or with friends in multiplayer and find your escape room player type. Can you escape the twisted maze, or will you become another lost soul?
detailed_description:
Imagine a place where the line between reality and nightmare fades away.

Welcome to The Lethe.

Once a sanctuary for society's most fragile minds, The Lethe concealed a sinister truth beneath its facade of healing. What was meant to mend the broken was, in reality, a twisted experiment designed to shatter the soul.

In RealEscape, an immersive 3D single-player escape room game, you’ll confront the chilling remnants of this abandoned asylum. Every room tells a story, every shadow whispers a secret, and every step drags you deeper into its horrifying past. Can you unravel the truth and escape, or will you become another victim lost in its endless maze?

Key Features:

  • Single-player and Multiplayer Modes: Choose to venture alone or team up with friends in multiplayer mode. Work together or face the horrors by yourself—but beware, the asylum is full of surprises.

  • Escape Room Player and Team Profiles: Your profile evolves based on your choices and performance, reflecting your escape skills and achievements. Whether solo or with a team, your journey shapes your identity in The Lethe with 10 player and 4 team profiles to uncover!

  • Challenging Puzzles and Mind-Bending Mysteries: Each room offers a unique challenge, designed to test your wits and nerves. Solve riddles, uncover hidden passages, and decipher cryptic messages that will lead you to your freedom… or doom.

  • Dynamic World: The Lethe constantly shifts as you unravel its darkest secrets. Be prepared for the unexpected – the deeper you go, the more unpredictable it becomes.

  • An Intriguing Narrative: Begin your journey as part of a team, but soon discover the true horror of being utterly alone.

  • Diverse Challenges: Explore three distinct rooms, each offering a unique aesthetic, story, and gameplay style:

    • The Hospital: A twisted labyrinth of psychological puzzles that will test your wits.

    • The Lost Mines: An adventurous trek into forgotten depths filled with hidden dangers.

    • The Nightmare Escape: A frantic race for survival as a terrifying creature hunts you in the dark.

  • Think Outside the Box: Solve intricate puzzles, utilize objects in unexpected ways, and observe every detail to find your way out.

The Lethe is more than a game; it’s an invitation. Do you dare to answer the call?
